confidence_notes: High confidence on seeded findings backed by evidence, replay, patch, and trace artifacts.
Medium confidence on frontend/config exposure because interpretation remains reviewer-led.
Partial confidence on auth/session trust because the runtime intentionally omits a real auth provider.
before_state: Promising demo app with light audit scaffolding.
after_state: Premium demo target with traces, proof bundles, replay vault, merge-readiness artifacts, and a verifier-backed preflight.
